ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Kirloskar Oil Engines Limited has disclosed a schedule of routine 1x1 and group virtual meetings with several prominent financial institutions and asset managers, including Aditya Birla and DSP Mutual Funds, on June 26th and 29th, 2026. This disclosure, mandated by SEBI Regulation 30, reflects standard corporate engagement with the investment community to discuss company performance and outlook. The document itself is a compliance filing and presents no immediate red flags or unusual material impacts beyond typical investor relations activities.
